meaning: New General Catalogue (of Nebulae and Clusters of Stars)[天](星云星团)新总表
examples: If the center of NGC 4258 were a star cluster, the stars would be so closely spaced that collisions between individual stars would have long ago torn the cluster apart.
Image: Composite image of galaxy NGC 3115.
NGC 7380 was discovered by Caroline Herschel in 1787.
Like virtually every other galaxy in the universe, the Galaxy NGC 4845 has a central black hole.
We even get to see a (relative) close-up of a "barred spiral galaxy" (above) called NGC 1365.
